articles.title: Europe has 'maybe six weeks of jet fuel left', energy boss warns - BBC
articles.description: Flights could soon be cancelled if supplies from the Gulf remain blocked, says the International Energy Agency.
articles.content: Airlines UK, which represents the industry, said while it was not seeing disruption to UK jet fuel supply, it was talking to the government about "crucial measures" that would be needed to support th… [+150 chars]
